task_prompt: Run Data_Clean_Variable_Creation.R, then Analysis_MainText.R, then Analysis_Appendix.R, then main.py in PythonScripts.
tasks: From the Figure2.pdf plot results, report the 'politeness package feature' with highest 'Marginal Effects of GPT-3 Rephrasings'. Report only the name.
From the Figure3_topic_proportions.pdf plot results, report the topic name with largest gap between 'Untreated messages' and 'Treated messages after rephrasing'.

From the Figure4.pdf plot results, report the percentage-point effect of receiving one or more AI rephrasings on partners’ Conversation Quality Index. Report only the number rounded to one decimal place.
From Figure4.pdf results, report whether the effect of receiving AI rephrasings on the Democratic Reciprocity Index is larger for recipients than for their partners. Report only Yes or No.
